home.workspaceSummary: A book workspace where the left side handles structure, the center handles writing, and the right side opens design and editorial tools.
home.workspaceLeftDesc: Organize parts, chapters, and front/back matter while keeping track of your current position.
home.workspaceCenterDesc: Write the current page, edit it, and switch to preview immediately.
home.workspaceRightDesc: Open design, book info, history, and copilot in the current working context.
home.stepPlanDesc: Create a Part/Chapter outline instantly with Quick Start.
home.stepWriteDesc: Edit safely with auto-save and version management.
home.stepPublishDesc: Ship your result easily as EPUB or DOCX.
home.resumeUnavailable: No recently saved file is available.
home.supportedFormats: Open: BKSP | Import: EPUB, DOCX, Markdown
home.quickStartHint: If this is your first time, start with Quick Start.
home.safetyHint: Auto-save and version management help recovery while writing.
home.helpSubtitle: A short guide for the actions you use most on first launch.
home.helpStart1: Quick Start instantly creates a Part/Chapter outline for you.
home.helpStart2: Use New Project if you want to build the structure from scratch.
home.helpSafe1: Your work is auto-saved, and you can roll back from Version Manager.
home.helpSafe2: Before major edits, manual save with Cmd/Ctrl+S is recommended.
home.helpIO1: Use Open File for BKSP project files.
home.helpIO2: When done, export your manuscript as EPUB or DOCX.

messages.draftRestoreSuccess: Draft restored. Save it to a file when ready.

errors.useImportForExternal: Use `Import` in the editor top bar for EPUB/DOCX/Markdown files.
errors.resumeNotFound: No recently saved file is available to continue.

titleBar.signedInHint: You are signed in with the current account.
titleBar.signOutHint: Sign out of the current account.
titleBar.signInGoogleHint: Sign in with your Google account.
titleBar.upgradeDevApplied: Switched to PRO LITE in development mode.
titleBar.updateDirtyStateBlocked: Please save your changes first, then retry.

leftPane.structureDescription: Use this area to read the book skeleton and manage the current page and part layout.
leftPane.title: Title
leftPane.subtitle: Subtitle

rightPane.workspaceDescriptionDesign: Adjust design using the current page and section as context.
rightPane.workspaceDescriptionHistory: Review saved versions and restore candidates.
rightPane.workspaceDescriptionCopilot: Run editorial guidance against the current manuscript context.
rightPane.workspaceDescriptionCover: Manage cover and logo assets for the book.
rightPane.copilotComposerHintPage: Answers are grounded in the current page, `{{title}}`. Ask about flow, tone, structure, or how to use a feature.
rightPane.copilotComposerHintNoPage: Select a page for more grounded editorial feedback. You can still ask about product features or book-wide questions now.
rightPane.coverHint: Set the image used as EPUB cover.
rightPane.backCoverHint: Set the image used as EPUB back cover.
rightPane.coverDropHint: Click thumbnail or drag and drop an image
rightPane.imageMaxFileSize: Image file is too large. Please use a file up to {{sizeMB}}MB.
rightPane.unsupportedImageType: Unsupported image type. Only JPG, PNG, WEBP, and GIF are allowed.
rightPane.imagePreferredFormatHint: JPG or PNG is recommended for better viewer compatibility.
rightPane.imageMaxDimensions: Image is too large. Maximum allowed size is {{max}}px. (Current {{width}}x{{height}})
rightPane.bookInfoValidationRequired: Enter a title and primary author before saving.
rightPane.bookInfoLanguageValidation: Use an EPUB BCP47 language tag. Example: ko, en, en-US
rightPane.languageBcp47Hint: Use EPUB-standard BCP47 language tags. Example: ko, en, en-US, zh-Hans
rightPane.activityChatFailed: Failed to generate the chat response.
rightPane.activityPreviewBlocked: Preview was blocked by credits or access policy.
rightPane.activityPreviewEmpty: No actionable changes were generated from this request.
rightPane.activityApplyFailed: Failed while applying the proposed changes.
rightPane.activitySteerAccepted: Accepted the steer instruction for the active turn.
rightPane.activitySteerRejected: Could not apply the steer instruction.
rightPane.activityResumePrepared: Prepared a draft to continue the interrupted work.
rightPane.activityRunContinuePrepared: Prepared the next prompt to continue the current run.
rightPane.activityInterruptFailed: Failed to interrupt the active work.
rightPane.activityNeedExistingPage: Need to resolve the requested page first.
rightPane.activityNeedConfirmation: Need to confirm the interpreted structural change first.
rightPane.resumeInterruptedReady: Prepared a draft to continue the interrupted run.
rightPane.resumeInterruptedDefaultPrompt: Continue the interrupted work from the next unfinished step without repeating what is already done.
rightPane.runContinueReady: Prepared the next-step prompt in the composer.
rightPane.verifyRunDefaultPrompt: Summarize only the remaining warnings after apply and tell me what to verify first.
rightPane.turnInterruptUnavailable: There is no in-progress request to stop.
rightPane.turnSteerAccepted: Applying your revision request to the current turn.
rightPane.turnSteerUnavailable: No active turn is available for steer.
rightPane.turnEarlyStopHint: The response is getting long. You can stop early with the Stop button.
rightPane.runtimeConfigDirectApiKeySaved: API key is saved in the desktop runtime.
rightPane.planNextStepHint: Next, I will prepare a reviewable change set.
rightPane.agentStepUnderstandDetail: Interpreted the {{intent}} request against the current context.
rightPane.agentStepPlanDetail: Bundling executable commands and review points.
rightPane.agentStepReviewDetail: Getting a reviewable change set ready before apply.
rightPane.agentStepApplyDetail: Write approved changes into the working document.
rightPane.agentStepCheckDetail: Verify warnings and recovery points after apply.
rightPane.agentTaskReadDetail: Reviewed the current book, chapter, and selection context for {{intent}}.
rightPane.agentTaskPreviewDetail: Prepare the reviewable change set and risk points before apply.
rightPane.agentTaskReviewDetail: Pause for user review when approval is needed.
rightPane.agentTaskApplyDetail: Write the approved changes into the project state.
rightPane.agentTaskVerifyDetail: Check warnings, recovery points, and whether follow-up work is needed.
rightPane.agentCheckPassedDetail: This turn finished without critical warnings.
rightPane.agentCheckPassedDetailWithCheckpoint: Check complete. You can recover with snapshot {{checkpointId}}.
rightPane.agentCheckWarningDetail: Apply finished, but warnings or extra review remain.
rightPane.agentCheckWarningDetailWithCheckpoint: Warnings remain after apply. You can recover with snapshot {{checkpointId}}.
rightPane.agentEvalPassSummary: This run is in a good state to continue.
rightPane.agentEvalWarnSummary: The run finished, but extra review is still needed.
rightPane.agentEvalFailSummary: Execution stopped mid-run and needs follow-up.
rightPane.agentEvalNeedsUserSummary: User input is needed before the next step.
rightPane.structuredConfirmationHint: If this interpretation is correct, tell me to proceed. If not, revise the parent, order, or title and ask again.
rightPane.agentEvalNextPolish: You can continue polishing the next section or related inspector from here.
rightPane.agentEvalNextReview: Warnings remain, so review the related inspector or recovery point first.
rightPane.agentEvalNextRecover: Check the recovery guidance, then restore from snapshot or retry with a smaller scope.
rightPane.agentEvalNextClarify: A short clarification will help the next plan become more precise.
rightPane.agentEvalNextExport: Before exporting, verify the format, assets, and metadata one more time.
rightPane.agentEvalNextContinue: After saving, you can continue with structure or design review.
rightPane.missingChapterSuggestCreate: The current document does not have {{chapter}} yet. If you want, I can create that page first and continue from there.
rightPane.missingChapterSuggestCreateAndRename: The current document does not have {{chapter}} yet. If you want, I can create a new page first and set its title to "{{title}}".
rightPane.applyReady: Everything is confirmed. You can apply the changes below.
rightPane.applySimpleReady: If this change looks right, you can apply it now.
rightPane.applyBlockedNoCommands: Apply is disabled because there are no changes to run.
rightPane.applyBlockedSafetyConfirm: Complete the review checkbox to enable apply.
rightPane.applyBlockedDangerConfirm: Complete the extra high-risk approval to enable apply.
rightPane.applySafetyConfirm: I reviewed the changes and agree to apply them.
rightPane.applyDangerConfirm: I understand this is high-risk and approve one more time.
rightPane.applyHighRiskConfirmRequired: High-risk change detected. Confirm the extra approval checkbox first.
rightPane.tokenBudgetExceeded: Thread token budget exceeded. Start a new thread or compact context and retry.
rightPane.contextStatusFresh: There is still plenty of context room.
rightPane.contextStatusWatch: This thread is getting longer, so earlier turns are being carried forward mostly as a summary.
rightPane.contextStatusTight: Context room is getting tight. It is safer to split into a new thread or narrow the request.
rightPane.riskReasonDeleteHigh: Includes delete commands with high risk.
rightPane.riskReasonStructureHigh: Many structural changes increase risk significantly.
rightPane.riskReasonBulkRewrite: Rewrites multiple ranges in one apply.
rightPane.riskReasonSaveProjectDetail: Review the target path and save mode before applying.
rightPane.riskReasonSetTypographyDetail: Font, scale, and spacing changes may affect multiple scenes together.
rightPane.riskReasonSetPageBackgroundDetail: Background color or imagery directly changes the overall page mood.
rightPane.riskReasonApplyThemeDetail: Applying a theme updates multiple design tokens at once.
rightPane.riskReasonRenameChapterDetail: The chapter label changes in both structure and reading navigation.
rightPane.riskReasonDeleteChapterDetail: Deleting a chapter removes it from content and structure immediately.
rightPane.riskReasonMoveChapterDetail: Changing chapter order affects reading flow and navigation.
rightPane.riskReasonSetChapterTypeDetail: Changing the chapter type can alter rendering and section styling.
rightPane.riskReasonUpdateBookInfoDetail: Metadata like title, authors, and language will affect exported outputs.
rightPane.riskReasonSetCoverAssetDetail: Replacing cover assets changes both visible artwork and packaged assets.
rightPane.riskReasonExportProjectDetail: Review the export format and included options before running it.
rightPane.riskReasonRestoreSnapshotDetail: Restoring will roll the current editing state back to the snapshot.
rightPane.riskReasonInvalidRange: Range info is incomplete and may fail to apply.
rightPane.riskReasonEditorMissing: Editor is not ready to apply changes.
rightPane.riskReasonChapterMismatch: Target chapter may not match the current document.
rightPane.emptyStateTitle: Describe the change you want in one sentence.
rightPane.suggestedPromptBookInfo: Check only the missing book info fields and suggest short draft values for title, primary author, and language.
rightPane.suggestedPromptActiveChapter: Based on the {{title}} page body, suggest one typography change I can apply right away.
rightPane.suggestedPromptCover: Narrow the cover and logo direction down to three options that fit the current manuscript mood.
rightPane.suggestedPromptTheme: Suggest one concrete set of color, font, and spacing tweaks for the current {{theme}} theme.
rightPane.suggestedPromptExport: Give me a three-line checklist of what to verify before exporting EPUB from the current state.
rightPane.followUpPromptReduceRisk: Make only the risky parts of this proposal more conservative.
rightPane.followUpPromptDesignReview: Point out only the design items I should verify directly for this proposal.
rightPane.followUpPromptMetadataPolish: Polish the book info so it matches this proposal more naturally.
rightPane.followUpPromptCoverPolish: Suggest the next cover and logo steps that fit this proposal.
rightPane.followUpPromptStructureCheck: List what I should verify in version history before applying this structural change.
rightPane.followUpPromptSaveNow: Tell me whether I should save now or review more first.
rightPane.followUpPromptExportCheck: Give me a short final checklist before exporting from this state.
rightPane.emptyExampleAppend: Append a two-paragraph note to readers at the end of the current chapter.
rightPane.emptyExampleRename: Rename chapter 3 to 'Night Crossing the Sea'.
rightPane.emptyExampleTheme: Apply a calm paper-texture theme that fits this book.
rightPane.emptyExampleExport: Export this project as EPUB with embedded fonts.
rightPane.reviewSummaryRewriteSelection: Replace the selected passage with new wording.
rightPane.reviewSummaryAppendText: Append new text at the end or chosen position of the target chapter.
rightPane.reviewSummaryFindReplace: Find and replace text within the requested scope.
rightPane.reviewSummaryRenameChapter: Rename the chapter to the new title.
rightPane.reviewSummaryDeleteChapter: Remove the target chapter from both structure and content.
rightPane.reviewSummaryMoveChapter: Reorder the chapter within the document structure.
rightPane.reviewSummarySetChapterType: Change the chapter type to adjust layout and section styling.
rightPane.reviewSummarySetTypography: Adjust typography values to change the reading tone.
rightPane.reviewSummaryApplyTheme: Apply a new theme across the book.
rightPane.reviewSummarySetCoverAsset: Replace a cover or logo asset.
rightPane.reviewSummaryExportProject: Export the current project as a deliverable file.
rightPane.reviewSummaryRestoreSnapshot: Restore the workspace to the selected snapshot state.
rightPane.reviewSummaryInsertTable: Insert a table into the current context.
rightPane.reviewSummaryInsertIllustration: Insert an illustration into the current context.
rightPane.reviewSummaryFeedbackReport: Summarize the analysis as a feedback report.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeRewriteSelection: The selected passage will be replaced with the new wording.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeAppendText: New paragraphs will be added to the target chapter.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeFindReplace: Matching text in the selected scope will be updated.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeSaveProject: The current state will be saved into the project file.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeDeleteChapter: The target chapter will be removed from the document structure.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeUpdateBookInfo: Metadata fields will be saved with the new values.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeCreateChapter: A new chapter will be added to the document structure.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeInsertTable: A table block will be inserted into the current context.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeInsertIllustration: An illustration block will be inserted into the current context.
rightPane.reviewOutcomeFeedbackReport: A report message will be added to the conversation.
rightPane.reviewRecoveryHistory: You can recover this from version history.
rightPane.reviewRecoveryFileOutput: The exported file can be generated again if needed.
rightPane.reviewRecoveryStandard: If a restore point is saved before apply, you can roll this back.

inspect.missingImageAlt: Some image alt text is missing.

rightPane.chatFallbackGreeting: Hello. What would you like to work on?
rightPane.chatFallbackGeneral: Tell me your target outcome or tone, and I'll shape it with you.
rightPane.chatFallbackNoResponse: The reply came back empty, so I couldn't finish the request cleanly. Please restate the outcome a bit more specifically.
rightPane.emptyStateHelper: Describe the editing work you want to do, such as shaping the structure, refining prose, or organizing cover and metadata.
rightPane.recoveryHintReviewRisk: Review the risk reasons and retry apply when ready.
rightPane.recoveryHintApplyFailedWithSnapshot: Apply failed: restore from snapshot {{checkpointId}} in Version Manager.
rightPane.recoveryHintApplyFailedNoSnapshot: Apply failed: no automatic restore point exists, review manually.
rightPane.recoveryHintWithSnapshot: A pre-apply version was saved. You can restore it in Version Manager.
rightPane.recoveryHintNoSnapshot: Changes were applied. Save now if you want to keep this state.

centerPane.recentFileRemoved: Removed an unavailable file from recent files.
centerPane.aiGenerateFailed: AI could not complete the request: {{error}}
centerPane.aiInsufficientCredits: You do not have enough AI credits. Recharge and try again.
centerPane.aiLockedPro: This feature is available on the PRO plan.
centerPane.aiRefundFailed: Credit refund failed. Please check again in a moment.
centerPane.aiNeedsContext: Please provide more context. Select text or choose a target scope.
centerPane.aiPreviewEmpty: No changes were generated. Try a more specific request.
centerPane.aiApplyFailed: Could not apply the proposed changes: {{error}}
centerPane.autoSaveErrorPinned: Auto-save failed. Please save again in a moment.

historyModal.title: Version Manager
historyModal.restoreHint: Restore this version: apply to this file / Create as new project: create another file
historyModal.openAsNewHint: Create and open a new project file from this version.
historyModal.restoreCurrentHint: Restore the current open file to this version.

exportModal.docxHint: DOCX uses the title as default filename. Set detailed metadata in EPUB export.
exportModal.subtitle: Subtitle
exportModal.embedFontsHint: Enabling this may increase export file size.

designPanel.pageBackgroundScopeHint: Applies to the current page only.
designPanel.sectionScopeHint: This changes styles for all pages in {{section}}.

scopeHelp.currentPage: Edit styles only for the section that contains the current page.
scopeHelp.section: Edit style presets for the selected section.

designPanel.coreSettingsHint: Start with the slots you tune most often: body, subtitle, and title.
designPanel.advancedSettingsHint: Open extra style slots only when you need finer control.

quickStartTemplate.partIntroText: Write an intro for this part.

bookEditor.emptyTitle: Select a page to start working
bookEditor.emptyStep1Desc: Pick a part or page from document structure to start working here.
bookEditor.emptyStep2Desc: Edit the selected page here, then switch to preview when needed.
bookEditor.emptyStep3Desc: Design, book info, and copilot open in the right panel using the current context.
bookEditor.selectChapterHint: Select a chapter on the left or add a new one.
bookEditor.imagePageHint: Select an image to build this image page.
bookEditor.imagePolicySummary: Preferred JPG/PNG · Min {{minWidth}}x{{minHeight}} · Max {{max}}px · Up to {{sizeMB}}MB

bookEditor.imageAltPrompt: Enter alt text for this image. Leave empty if unnecessary.
bookEditor.confirmDescription: Current page content will be replaced by the copyright preset.

toasts.signInUnavailable: Sign-in is not available right now. Please try again shortly.

confirm.importReplacePrompt: Import replaces your current workspace. Continue?
